headlines.title: Maine voters set up a Senate showdown: Graham Platner versus Susan Collins
headlines.description: Graham Platner and Susan Collins handily won their party nominations in Tuesday’s primary, setting up a marquee race with unique dynamics and major implications for control of the Senate.

headlines.title: Republican Steve Hilton to face Democrat Xavier Becerra in California governor’s race
headlines.description: NBC News projected Tuesday that Hilton, a former Fox News host, will advance from a crowded all-party primary field to the general election.

headlines.title: Before arrest with 303 gold bars, CIA officer spun tale he was Top Gun fighter pilot
headlines.description: David Rush’s former firefighter colleagues looked up to him as an ace pilot. Now they wonder whether he was making it all up “like Leonardo DiCaprio in ‘Catch Me If You Can.’”

headlines.title: ‘My job is to earn your trust’: Platner speaks to voters after projected win
headlines.description: Veteran and oyster farmer Graham Platner addressed his supporters after his projected win in the Maine Democratic Senate primary. To those who feel let down or disappointed, he said, “it is my job to earn your trust,” and added that, if elected, he would be a “senator for the people who cannot afford to buy a senator.”

headlines.title: Platner projected winner in Maine Democratic Senate primary
headlines.description: NBC News' projects that in Maine, Graham Platner has won the Democratic Senate primary, while in South Carolina the Republican governor's race will head for a runoff and Sen. Lindsey Graham holds off a challenger in his Senate primary. NBC News' Ryan Nobles has the latest election results.

headlines.title: U.S. completes retaliatory strikes against Iran after helicopter downing
headlines.description: The U.S. military says multiple rounds of retaliatory strikes which targeted air defense and radar sites are now complete. NBC News’ Matt Bradley explains how the downing of an Apache helicopter by an Iranian drone provoked the return fire.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo to face off against Democrat Aaron Ford in Nevada’s race for governor
headlines.description: Nevada Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo and Democrat Aaron Ford have won their primaries, NBC News projects, officially setting up what’s expected to be one of the most competitive gubernatorial contests in the fall

headlines.title: Maine’s race for governor heads to ranked choice tallies in both primaries
headlines.description: Democratic Gov. Janet Mills is barred by term limits from running again, leading to a wide-open race.

headlines.title: Democrats await ranked choice vote in Maine to decide key House nominee
headlines.description: Republicans want to flip a pro-Trump, Democratic-held House seat as part of their plans to hold onto their slim majority in the House.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Pamela Evette advances to GOP primary runoff against Alan Wilson in South Carolina governor’s race
headlines.description: NBC News projects that the state’s lieutenant governor and attorney general will face off June 23 after no candidate won more than 50% of the vote.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham wins GOP primary, defeating wealthy challenger in South Carolina
headlines.description: Graham spent millions to defeat a primary opponent, NBC News projects, after receiving President Donald Trump’s endorsement last year.
